## What does this change?

## Type of change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / config

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran the app locally and the change works
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` inside `apps/web`)
- [ ] No school data is committed (no student/parent records, raw spreadsheets, or `.env` files)
- [ ] Linked to a task/issue if there is one

## Notes for review
<!-- Screenshots, follow-ups, anything the reviewer should know. -->
